title: CSB Run Config
description: Schema for csb run config YAML files.  Use `csb run config.yaml` to launch.

model.description: Model short name or full provider path (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6' or 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6').

augmentation.description: MCP augmentation mode for the run.

preamble.description: Path to a custom agent preamble file, or inline preamble text.

task_subset.description: Path to a task selection JSON file (default: configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json).

category.description: Run category label written into the result directory path.

parallel.description: Max concurrent task slots. Default: auto-detect from accounts.

skip_completed.description: Skip tasks where validation_result.json has status=scored.
